zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Dalton於大約1487年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾比斯法姆時，他的父親Sir Richard Dalton43歲，母親Elizabeth Isabel Fleming39歲。他於1512年與Anne Radcliffe在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1527年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Dalton was born about 1487, in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Dalton, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabel Fleming, was 39. He married Anne Radcliffe in 1512, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1527, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Dalton est né environ 1487, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Dalton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabel Fleming, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Anne Radcliffe en 1512, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1527, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Dalton um 1487 in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Dalton 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Isabel Fleming 39. Er hat 1512 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1527 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Anne Radcliffe nel 1512, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1527, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Daltonが約1487年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Daltonは43歳，母Elizabeth Isabel Flemingは39歳であった。1512年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAnne Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1527年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Dalton(이)가 대략 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 비스프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Dalton(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabel Fleming(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Anne Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1527년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
